0.name: EXIT_OK
0.description: Command executed successfully without any errors.

2.name: EXIT_CIRCULAR_DEPENDENCY
2.description: Circular dependency detected among release components.

3.name: EXIT_VERSION_DOWNGRADE
3.description: Version downgrade detected - target version is lower than currently deployed.

4.name: EXIT_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH
4.description: Package checksum does not match the declared checksum.

5.name: EXIT_APPROVAL_MISSING
5.description: Production environment release is missing required approval records.

10.name: EXIT_CONFIG_ERROR
10.description: Configuration or manifest file is invalid or cannot be parsed.

11.name: EXIT_FILE_NOT_FOUND
11.description: Required file (manifest, config, archive, etc.) not found.

12.name: EXIT_VALIDATION_FAILED
12.description: General validation failure that does not fall into more specific categories.

13.name: EXIT_PLAN_ERROR
13.description: Failed to generate a valid release or rollback plan.

14.name: EXIT_EXPORT_ERROR
14.description: Failed to export or package the release archive.

15.name: EXIT_HISTORY_ERROR
15.description: Failed to read or query execution history.

16.name: EXIT_DRYRUN_FAILED
16.description: Dry-run simulation detected issues during simulated execution.

99.name: EXIT_INTERNAL_ERROR
99.description: Unexpected internal error occurred during execution.
